text: I am surrounded by vivid colors and sharp lines, my reflection briefly caught in the glass walls. Entering this space, labeled as "R+D," I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The energy of innovation fills the air, and I am drawn to the interplay of technology, intellect, and creativity on display. I wonder how our evolving relationships with intelligent machines are being examined here, and how this dialogue shapes not just knowledge, but my own identity as both witness and participant. There is excitement but also a subtle sense of unease—progress always brings transformation, and I cannot help but question what is gained and what may be lost.
